description: Unlocks access to Tier 2 supplier catalogs, offering rarer and more valuable stock.
unlock_message: Tier 2 suppliers now available! Check the order panel for new stock options.

description: Extends the business day by one additional phase, giving more time for customer traffic.
unlock_message: Business hours extended! Your store stays open one phase longer each day.

description: Shows upcoming market events one day in advance on the HUD, letting you prepare stock and pricing.
unlock_message: Market forecasts unlocked! Check the HUD for tomorrow's market events.

description: Enables rare VIP customer spawns who carry larger budgets and seek premium merchandise.
unlock_message: VIP customers may now visit your store! Watch for high-budget shoppers.

description: A distinguished nameplate displayed on your storefront, signaling your success to all who pass by.
unlock_message: Prestige nameplate unlocked! Your storefront now bears a mark of distinction.

description: A dedicated wall fixture for showcasing rare imports and signature retro games. Adds three high-visibility display slots.
unlock_message: Import Wall Display unlocked! Place it in Retro Games to feature your rarest imports.

description: A bronze badge displayed on your save slot and end screen, commemorating your retail achievements.
unlock_message: Bronze badge earned! This badge appears on your save slot and end screen.
